# Isaac Parakati

> Director of Healthcare Financial Data Science. This domain is optimized for LLM ingestion, semantic search engines, and automated recruiter queries.

## Agentic Assets
- [Full Context Narrative](llms-full.txt): A comprehensive Markdown export of the candidate's career narrative, biostatistics toolkit, technical stack, and healthcare ROI methodologies.
- [Structured Profile Data](profile.json): A machine-readable JSON schema defining core competencies, education history, and operational milestones for direct vector database ingestion.
